caption: A person holds a baseball card in front of a camera in a room with a desk and computer equipment. The card features a photo of Tim Raines of the Montreal Expos and includes the text "CONGRATULATIONS!" followed by "You have just received a One-of-One 1989 Topps Big Baseball Framed Autograph Card from 2021 Topps Transcendent Collection - Hall of Fame Edition." The card also lists career statistics for the player. In the background, a man with a beard wearing a dark blue shirt is visible, sitting at a desk with a microphone and monitor. A logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.com" is visible in the upper right corner and on a banner behind the man. Across the sequence, the card is slightly shifted in the person's grip, while the man in the background remains seated, looking toward the camera.
